title: Internal develop-v5 clang-tidy warnings
body:
@gezalore you might want to look at 12925cd8b where I pushed some clang-tidy fixes on new code in develop-v5.

In addition you should look at these.

```
12925cd8b0 (Wilson Snyder  2022-07-30 12:49:30 -0400 1526)         = OrderProcess::main(netlistp, *graph, trigToSen, tag, parallel, slow, externalDomains);
src/V3Order.cpp:1526:45: warning: parameter 'externalDomains' is passed by value and only copied once; consider moving it to avoid unnecessary copies [performance-unnecessary-value-param]

ff1b9930fc (Geza Lore      2022-07-14 11:06:20 +0100  954)                  const string& tag, bool slow, V3Order::ExternalDomainsProvider externalDomains)
src/V3Order.cpp:954:18: warning: pass by value and use std::move [modernize-pass-by-value]

ff1b9930fc (Geza Lore      2022-07-14 11:06:20 +0100  954)                  const string& tag, bool slow, V3Order::ExternalDomainsProvider externalDomains)
src/V3Order.cpp:954:48: warning: pass by value and use std::move [modernize-pass-by-value]

ff1b9930fc (Geza Lore      2022-07-14 11:06:20 +0100  957)         , m_externalDomains{externalDomains}
src/V3Order.cpp:957:29: warning: parameter 'externalDomains' is passed by value and only copied once; consider moving it to avoid unnecessary copies [performance-unnecessary-value-param]

ff1b9930fc (Geza Lore      2022-07-14 11:06:20 +0100  974)         OrderProcess visitor{netlistp, graph, trigToSen, tag, slow, externalDomains};
src/V3Order.cpp:974:69: warning: parameter 'externalDomains' is passed by value and only copied once; consider moving it to avoid unnecessary copies [performance-unnecessary-value-param]

```

Make clang-tidy runs this, it's hacky and we're intentionally far from clean so no requirement this be clean.
